ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Main category of the product (e.g., Women, Footwear) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Specific category or subcategory (e.g., Running, T-Shirts) */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Collection ID of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Current discount on the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collection */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Promotion ID linked to the collection */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the collection is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to avail the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
column_names: Main category of the product (e.g., Women, Footwear)
Specific category or subcategory (e.g., Running, T-Shirts)
Size of the product (e.g., S, M, L)
Date the product was added to the inventory
Date the product information was last updated
Average customer rating of the product
Number of customer reviews for the product
Promotion ID linked to the collection
Indicates whether the collection is currently active
Minimum purchase amount required to avail the promotion
Name of the contact person at the supplier
Indicates whether the supplier is active
